title: Implement descriptor-only narada sites create dry-run command
implemented: Added descriptor-only sitesCreateCommand for narada sites create --dry-run --config <path> --format json.
Added optional --output-plan artifact write, bounded to explicit dry-run plan output.
Expanded minimal, agent-memory, and task-lifecycle greenfield presets into structured plan JSON.
Expanded @narada2/site-task-lifecycle and @narada2/agent-context-memory package selections as descriptor-only template components.
Refused full operator-surface-aware preset as fixture-only until live surfaces are separately admitted.

Added refusal guards for source Site runtime state, secrets/credentials, PC/operator-surface runtime state, live adapter/MCP/profile/hydration admissions, implicit live capability grants, unknown packages, and identity/role authority smear.
Registered narada sites create in the CLI command tree.

verification.command: pnpm --dir packages\layers\cli exec vitest run test/commands/sites-create.test.ts

verification.summary: CLI registration smoke emitted narada.create_site.dry_run_plan.v0 with status planned

earlier_failed_verification.command: pnpm --dir packages\layers\cli exec vitest run test/commands/sites-create.test.ts
earlier_failed_verification.summary: Initial test harness read fixtures through memfs and tempdir setup failed; fixed by unmocking node:fs and node:fs/promises.

explicit_non_claims: full operator-surface-aware User Site preset execution
rollback: Remove or revert the admitted CLI source/test edits.
Remove task-0011 .narada task/admission/audit entries before publication if the task is rejected.
No Site filesystem roots, live DBs, MCP registrations, secrets, or runtime state were created by this task.
next_smallest_slice: Implement a schema-backed create-site config parser/normalizer module shared by CLI and future template catalog code, still dry-run only.
